Our latest guest needs your help creating the perfect horse stable before her competition! Then, we have new events and a sale that will guarantee you a spotlight in the latest issue of Nouvelle!

-NEW ISSUE of Nouvelle: Siren Call!
-NEW SPONSORSHIP: Citrus Chill！
-NEW MAKEOVER: Full Gallop!
-NEW OBSTACLE: Scarf!
-NEW SALE: Marine Moods!
-60 new levels!

title: Angry Birds 2
notes: Minor bug fixes. Bugs: the only thing that (almost) makes us angrier than the piggies.

title: Truck Star
notes:
Ready for an exciting update?

- 100 new levels packed with thrilling challenges!
- Repair and upgrade the brand-new truck [Rift-W16]!
- The all-new event [Speed Grand Prix] is here!
- Join your friends in the new event [Ride with Crew] to earn even more rewards!
- The new merge event [Surf Safari] is coming soon!

Even more fun content is now live in the game—log in and check it out!

title: Carnival Tycoon: Coin Games
notes: Get ready for an enhanced experience with our latest update! Enjoy new features and improvements with this release. Update now and dive into the excitement!

title: Fortnite
notes:
New Sprites in BR

Karaoke Comes to Mobile: Now featuring Olivia Rodrigo and her new single "drop dead" in Fortnite Festival.

Something New Each Week: New Sprite Days, Golden Hours, Mastery Mondays, and more!

title: Texas Poker: Pokerist Pro
notes:
• NEW GAME—PAI GOW POKER •
Try the new poker game against the casino! Beat the dealer and win up to x20,000.

• NEW SLOT •
Spin the Wheel of Fortune and hit it big in Super Sapphire 7S

• ALBUMS •
New albums have arrived! Collect cards, fill albums, and get generous rewards!
